subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-09-21 in Omaha
subcodes.first_line: Up to now, whatever has occurred has had the effect of spreading the Cause of God.
subcodes.first_line_orig: تا بحال انچه واقع شده جمیع سبب اعلآء امر الله بود مهاجرت جمال مبارک از طهران و حرکت از بغداد
subcodes.subjects: @banishments of Baha'u'llah, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @growth of the Cause
